curation_notes: Patch commit 4cdf52e is a merge that adds namespace_controller.go (a new NamespaceReconciler enforcing pod security labels on ns-* namespaces) and wires it into controllers/user/main.go. The vulnerability is the absence of this controller in the pre-patch code — tenant namespaces are created without pod security admission labels, allowing unrestricted workload deployment. Vulnerability class auth-bypass confirmed: CWE-287/CWE-863 align with missing authorization enforcement on tenant namespaces.
